content:
🔥 desk_troll | HTML
🎯 Primary Use Case: A prank or gag application to temporarily disrupt a user's Windows desktop experience.
✨ Key Features: • Animated characters running on the desktop • Simulated fake desktop using a screenshot • Interactive elements like 'stealing' icons • Inverted mouse control • Clicking erases parts of the fake desktop
📖 Summary: This repository contains a prank application for Windows called 'desk_troll'. Upon execution, it simulates a fake desktop by displaying a screenshot of the user's actual desktop, while animated characters (a penguin and a fly) interact with it, 'stealing' icons and making the mouse behave erratically. The application is designed to be difficult to close, requiring a specific password.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
